testcase.name: test_authorize_invalid_pin
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_business_days.py:58: in test_authorize_invalid_pin assert resp.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 401, got 403: {"detail":"El usuario no tiene permiso para autorizar apertura/cierre de día"} E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
